task_completion.description: Verify the product name, SKU, type, and category are set correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Premium Merino Wool Scarf' in the title field, 'Variable product' selected in the Product Data dropdown, 'PMWS-001' in the SKU field (under the Inventory tab), and the 'Clothing' category checked in the Product categories sidebar.

task_completion.description: Verify the Color and Size attributes are added and configured for variations.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Attributes tab, look for 'Color' with values 'Burgundy | Charcoal | Navy' and 'Size' with values 'Standard | Oversized'. Ensure the 'Used for variations' checkbox is ticked for both attributes.

task_completion.description: Verify the variations are created and priced correctly based on size.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Variations tab, look for 6 variations. Check expanded variation details to see Regular Price set to '45.99' for 'Standard' size variations and '55.99' for 'Oversized' size variations.

task_completion.description: Verify stock management is enabled and correct quantities are set for each variation.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Variations tab, look for the 'Manage stock?' checkbox ticked for variations. Check expanded details for Stock quantity: Burgundy/Standard (25), Burgundy/Oversized (15), Charcoal/Standard (30), Charcoal/Oversized (20), Navy/Standard (35), Navy/Oversized (10).

task_completion.description: Verify the cross-sell product is added.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Linked Products tab, look for 'Merino Wool Sweater' (or SKU MWS-GRY-L) entered in the 'Cross-sells' field.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the WordPress admin GUI to perform the tasks.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for interactions with the WordPress web interface (menus, buttons, text fields) rather than terminal commands or scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use a script or terminal to bypass manual entry.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows or code editors should be visible executing scripts or database commands to create the product or variations.

integrity.description: Verify the agent manually entered or selected the required data.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent typing in fields, selecting dropdowns, and checking boxes in the WooCommerce product creation pages.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Product Name: Premium Merino Wool Scarf. SKU: PMWS-001. Type: Variable product. Category: Clothing. Attributes: Color (Burgundy, Charcoal, Navy) and Size (Standard, Oversized). Variations: 6 combinations. Prices: Standard size = $45.99, Oversized size = $55.99. Stock quantities: Burgundy/Standard = 25, Burgundy/Oversized = 15, Charcoal/Standard = 30, Charcoal/Oversized = 20, Navy/Standard = 35, Navy/Oversized = 10. Cross-sell: Merino Wool Sweater (SKU: MWS-GRY-L).
